---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new tool, parameter, or behavior change
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Use case
What are you trying to accomplish? Describe the user-facing scenario before
proposing an implementation.

## Proposed behavior
How should the server behave to support this use case? Include the tool name,
parameters, and return shape if applicable.

## Alternatives considered
Other approaches you weighed and why they fall short.

## Additional context
Links to related issues, MCP spec sections, or external tools that influence the
design.
